updates.title: While you avoid stocks, EPFO has doubled its equity investments in 7 years — Here's where your PF money goes
updates.summary: EPF members benefit from government-backed returns and tax-free interest. EPFO invests their contributions in various assets, including 85% in debt and 15% in equities.

updates.title: Watch: How a govt employee in Delhi saves ₹65,000 from a ₹90,000 salary every month
updates.summary: A 28-year-old government employee from Delhi has gone viral after revealing that she spends only around  ₹25,000 a month despite earning  ₹90,000 in hand. From rent and groceries to fuel and shopping, her budget breakdown has sparked conversations online.

updates.title: SEBI's new rule helps the wrong people
updates.summary: SEBI wants employers to route SIPs for salaried workers. But formal-sector employees already have auto-debit. The informal workforce, who need it most, are left out.

updates.title: PPF for children: Can both parents contribute to the account and claim tax deductions?
updates.summary: PPF is a long-term savings scheme with tax benefits. Parents can open a PPF account for minors, but total contributions by both parents cannot exceed  ₹1.5 lakh annually. Details here.&nbsp;

updates.title: I asked ChatGPT to calculate how inflation affects growth of my ₹50 lakh investment—the answer was a wake-up call
